name: send_with_template
description: Send a signature request using a previously created reusable template. You must provide the template_id and fill in the signer roles with actual names and email addresses. You can also pre-fill any merge fields defined in the template (like company name, date, etc.). Each signer role in the template must be matched to a real signer. This is the most efficient way to send recurring documents like NDAs, contracts, and onboarding forms.

parameters.name: template_id
parameters.description: The ID of the template to use for this signature request.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Override the default title from the template.

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Override the default email subject from the template.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Override the default message from the template.

parameters.name: signers
parameters.description: Array of signer objects mapping template roles to real people. Each object must have 'role' (matching a template signer role name), 'email_address', and 'name'.

parameters.name: custom_fields
parameters.description: Array of custom/merge field values to pre-fill. Each object has 'name' (matching a template merge field) and 'value'.

parameters.name: test_mode
parameters.description: Set to true to send in test mode (not legally binding). Default: false.

body.title: NDA - Acme Corp Partnership
body.subject: NDA for your review
body.message: Hi, please sign this NDA for our upcoming partnership.
